workflow_rationale: Adding build infrastructure capabilities - evals documentation, CI build verification, and contributor documentation. This follows a feature workflow because we're building new capabilities (CI job, docs) rather than refactoring existing code.

phases.name: Evals Setup Documentation
phases.description: Document the Python evals setup process so contributors can run evaluations locally

subtasks.description: Create evals/README.md with setup and usage instructions

verification.instructions: Review evals/README.md to ensure it documents: (1) venv creation, (2) dependency installation, (3) how to run offline tests, (4) how to run with API key

phases.name: Build Health Verification
phases.description: Verify all TypeScript packages and Tauri desktop app build cleanly, fix any issues

subtasks.description: Test full monorepo build with pnpm build

verification.expected: All packages build successfully with no errors

subtasks.notes: Fixed worktree symlinks via pnpm install. All 10 packages build successfully: shared, core, board-server, chat-relay, board, cli, desktop, marketplace, website. Non-blocking cosmetic warnings present (Next.js lockfile detection, missing optional plugins, Vite chunk size).

Desktop Tauri build successful. TypeScript compilation passed, Vite bundled 1792 modules, built in 2.93s. Non-blocking warnings present (chunk size >500kB, dynamic import patterns) but build succeeded.

subtasks.description: Verify board-server has no duplicate route issues from dist/ artifacts

verification.command: cd packages/board-server && pnpm build && pnpm dev & sleep 3 && pkill -f 'board-server'
verification.expected: No duplicate route warnings in server startup

subtasks.notes: ✅ Verified: No duplicate route warnings. Structure confirmed: src/ contains only .ts files, dist/ properly gitignored, routes registered once in server.ts, tsx watch only watches src/. Dev server started cleanly with no duplicate route warnings.

phases.name: CI Build Job
phases.description: Add GitHub Actions workflow to build all packages with pnpm caching

verification.instructions: Review workflow includes: (1) pnpm/action-setup with caching, (2) pnpm install, (3) pnpm build, (4) runs on push/PR to main, (5) reasonable timeout
Verify build badge added near validate badge at top of README

phases.name: Contributing Documentation
phases.description: Create CONTRIBUTING.md with complete build, test, and PR workflow

subtasks.description: Create CONTRIBUTING.md with setup, build, test, and PR guidelines

verification.instructions: Review CONTRIBUTING.md includes: (1) Prerequisites (Node, pnpm, Rust), (2) Clone and install steps, (3) Build all packages, (4) Run tests, (5) Evals setup, (6) PR process, (7) Common issues

phases.name: Integration Verification
phases.description: Verify complete build flow works end-to-end from fresh clone

subtasks.description: Test complete setup from CONTRIBUTING.md instructions

steps: Fresh clone simulation: rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf pnpm-lock.yaml
Setup evals: cd evals && python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
Verify build completes in <5 minutes (after cache warm-up)

subtasks.description: Verify CI build workflow passes on main branch

verification.instructions: After PR merge, verify build.yml workflow runs successfully on main and badge shows passing

parallel_groups.reason: Both have no dependencies and work on different files - can run in parallel

parallelism.speedup_estimate: 1.3x faster than sequential (phases 1-2 run in parallel)

acceptance_criteria: All TypeScript packages build successfully with pnpm build
Evals Python venv documented and can be created
Board-server has no duplicate route issues
Build completes in <5 minutes with cache

verification_steps.name: Evals Setup Test
verification_steps.command: cd evals && python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && python runner.py --offline
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Evals environment sets up and runs offline tests

verification_strategy.reasoning: Medium risk infrastructure change requires thorough integration testing but no security scanning. Main risk is breaking existing build workflows.

checks: build.yml runs on push/PR to main
All packages build successfully in CI
